title: spathandra lutescens
intro: Spathandra lutescens is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Spathandra lutescens are said to include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential use as an antimalarial agent. In traditional herbal preparations, Spathandra lutescens is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, where the plant's leaves and roots are boiled in water to create a medicinal tea.
